title: Plastic Flexible Laundry Basket 8L - Washing Clothes Storage Hamper Oval Container - Lightweight Strong Flexi Bucket, Easy To Carry Durable Flexi Handle - Assorted Color (8L, 1)

Its flexible body allows easy carrying and handling even when filled with heavier items, while the solid plastic build ensures it won’t lose its shape over time. Ideal for household chores, storage, and general use in the home, garden, or garage.

The smooth, rounded edges make it comfortable to carry, even when full. Whether you’re doing laundry, tidying toys, organising tools, or carrying groceries, these handles provide a safe and steady grip for quick transport around the house or outdoors.

𝟖𝐋 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐞𝐭: Compact and portable, measuring approximately 33 x 22 x 20 cm — perfect for smaller tasks like storing toys, cleaning supplies, or bathroom items.
Both sizes are designed to make everyday organising easier and more efficient, whether at home, in the garden, or on the go.
description: Keep your home organised and clutter-free with this Flexible Utility Basket, available in 8L and 50L sizes. Designed for everyday convenience, these baskets are made from durable, lightweight plastic that bends without breaking, offering the perfect balance of strength and flexibility. Whether you’re tackling laundry, sorting toys, storing tools, or managing garden waste, this practical basket is built to handle it all. Each basket features two integrated handles that make carrying easy and comfortable, even when full. The flexible design allows you to move it effortlessly from room to room or outdoors, while the smooth edges ensure safe handling. When not in use, these baskets nest neatly inside each other, saving valuable storage space in your home, car, or shed. The multi-purpose design makes it suitable for a wide range of uses — from laundry and cleaning tasks to gardening, camping, and general home storage. The assorted colours, sent randomly per order, add a fun and unique touch to your household essentials. Choose from two convenient sizes: 8L Basket (Approx. 33 x 22 x 20 cm) – compact and easy to carry, ideal for smaller household tasks. 50L Basket (Approx. 60 x 37 x 40.5 cm) – spacious and strong, perfect for larger storage needs. A simple, practical, and versatile solution for every home — this flexible plastic basket keeps your daily life tidy, efficient, and organised.
